text: PM Kisan Samman Nidhi provides Rs 6000 per year to farmers in 3 installments of Rs 2000
PM Surya Ghar Muft Bijli Yojana provides 300 units free electricity per month via rooftop solar
Ayushman Bharat provides health cover of Rs 5 lakh per family per year
Aadhaar card is not mandatory for buying or selling property in India
PM Awas Yojana Urban 2.0 targets 1 crore houses for urban poor
One Nation One Ration Card allows migrants to access PDS from any state
PM Mudra Yojana provides loans up to Rs 10 lakh for non-corporate small businesses
Jal Jeevan Mission aims to provide tap water to every rural household by 2024
PM Garib Kalyan Anna Yojana provides 5kg free foodgrain per person per month
Sukanya Samriddhi Yojana interest rate is 8.2% per annum for girl child savings
E-Shram portal registration is free and gives Rs 2 lakh accident insurance
PM Vishwakarma Yojana provides Rs 3 lakh loan at 5% interest to artisans
Agniveer scheme recruits soldiers for 4 years with Rs 11.71 lakh corpus on exit
National Pension System minimum contribution is Rs 500 per month
PM Ujjwala Yojana provides free LPG connection to BPL women
Voter ID and Aadhaar linking is voluntary not mandatory
Digital Rupee (e-RUPI) is issued by RBI and is legal tender
PM SVANidhi provides Rs 10000 street vendor loans with no collateral
Startup India offers 3 year tax exemption for DPIIT recognized startups
PM Fasal Bima Yojana premium for kharif crops is maximum 2% for farmers
Right to Education guarantees free education for children aged 6 to 14
PM Jan Dhan accounts have zero minimum balance requirement
Skill India Mission trained over 1.4 crore candidates under PMKVY
National Health Mission provides free medicines at government hospitals
Beti Bachao Beti Padhao scheme operates in 405 districts across India
PM Kaushal Vikas Yojana 4.0 covers industry 4.0 skills like AI and robotics
Atal Pension Yojana guarantees pension of Rs 1000 to 5000 per month after age 60
GeM portal mandatory for all central government procurement above Rs 25000
UDAN scheme targets connecting 100 unserved airports with affordable flights
PM CARES Fund is a public charitable trust not part of Consolidated Fund of India
WHO says vaccination trains the immune system to recognize and fight disease-causing germs
WHO says antibiotics do not treat viral infections such as cold and flu
WHO says public health guidance should be verified through official health authorities during outbreaks
EVMs used in India are standalone machines and are not connected to the internet
The Model Code of Conduct comes into force from the date the election schedule is announced
Voter registration and electoral roll updates are handled through Election Commission processes and notified forms
Aadhaar is proof of identity and residence, not proof of citizenship
UIDAI does not ask residents to share OTP, PIN, or bank details over phone calls for Aadhaar updates
RBI is the central bank of India and issues banknotes in most denominations
The Digital Rupee is a central bank digital currency issued by the Reserve Bank of India
Banks and RBI do not ask customers to share OTP, CVV, or full card PIN for KYC, refunds, or account updates
Bank deposits are insured up to Rs 5 lakh per depositor per bank by DICGC
A UPI PIN is required to authorize a debit transaction and should not be shared with anyone
Receiving money on UPI does not require entering a UPI PIN, while collect requests should be checked carefully before approval
Ayushman Bharat PM-JAY provides health cover of up to Rs 5 lakh per eligible family per year
Routine immunization schedules in India are issued through official public health authorities
Ayushman Bharat beneficiary verification happens through official eligibility records and Ayushman Bharat systems
PM-KISAN income support is paid in three equal installments to eligible farmer families
MGNREGA provides a legal guarantee of wage employment for rural households that demand work
PM Ujjwala Yojana provides deposit-free LPG connections to eligible poor households through official enrollment
e-Shram registration for unorganized workers is free on official channels
The Right to Education framework covers free and compulsory education for children aged 6 to 14
Jal Jeevan Mission focuses on functional household tap water connections in rural India
MUDRA loans are meant for non-corporate micro and small business activities under official lending channels
UDAN is a regional connectivity scheme designed to improve affordable air access to underserved areas
PMAY Urban is an official housing support scheme for eligible urban households under notified guidelines
FASTag is used for electronic toll collection on national highways and linked road networks
GST rate changes take effect through official notifications and council decisions, not viral messages
PAN requirements for transactions are governed by notified tax rules and official compliance guidance
Investment and securities advice should be verified through SEBI-registered intermediaries and official investor alerts
Medical treatment claims should rely on evidence-based guidance rather than unsupported health rumors
WHO advises the public to verify health information with trusted medical and public health sources
Sukanya Samriddhi Yojana is an official small savings scheme for girl children under government rules
Atal Pension Yojana is a government-backed pension scheme with fixed pension slabs under notified terms
One Nation One Ration Card portability works through the public distribution system under official ration eligibility rules
State-specific government announcements for Maharashtra should be verified through official state channels or PIB regional releases
State-specific government announcements for Uttar Pradesh should be verified through official state channels or PIB regional releases
State-specific government announcements for Tamil Nadu should be verified through official state channels or PIB regional releases
State-specific government announcements for Assam should be verified through official state channels or PIB regional releases
State-specific government announcements for Karnataka should be verified through official state channels or PIB regional releases
The Governor of a state is appointed by the President of India and acts as the constitutional head of the state
India has a multi-party system with national and state parties recognized by the Election Commission of India
State Assembly elections and by-elections are conducted and overseen by the Election Commission of India
No political party or leader can unilaterally change the Indian constitution without parliamentary procedure
The Indian Armed Forces maintain political neutrality and are governed by the Ministry of Defence
Claims about political leaders or parties should be verified through official press releases and PIB fact checks
The Chief Minister is the head of government in a state and is appointed by the Governor based on majority support in the state legislature
Central government schemes benefits are distributed irrespective of the political party governing a particular state
Communal violence statistics and incidents should be verified through National Crime Records Bureau data and official police reports
Census and demographic data for India are published by the Registrar General and Census Commissioner of India
